completeness_goals.goal: TurnEnd no longer extracts prompts from transcript or overwrites prompt.txt on filesystem; instead, prompts are appended to the filesystem prompt.txt at TurnStart (when the user prompt arrives)
completeness_goals.rationale: README headline ask: 'Remove ExtractPrompts() call and prompt.txt write from handleLifecycleTurnEnd. Add prompt append to filesystem at TurnStart.' User turn 1 plan explicitly says prompts should never be written from transcript at TurnEnd. Oracle removes ExtractPrompts+WriteFile from lifecycle.go:handleLifecycleTurnEnd and adds append logic in handleLifecycleTurnStart (lifecycle.go:140-159). Maps to test gates G1, G3, B2.

completeness_goals.goal: Checkpoint finalization (at turn end) reads prompts from shadow branch first, falling back to filesystem prompt.txt — not from transcript extraction
completeness_goals.rationale: README: 'Add filesystem fallback to finalizeAllTurnCheckpoints — read prompts from shadow branch first, then fall back to filesystem (not from transcript).' User turn 1 plan specifies shadow branch as primary source of truth with filesystem fallback. Oracle implements readPromptsFromShadowBranch + readPromptsFromFilesystem in manual_commit_hooks.go:finalizeAllTurnCheckpoints. Maps to test gate G2.

completeness_goals.goal: Commit message generation in TurnEnd uses the last prompt from session state (loaded via state persistence) rather than from transcript-extracted prompts array
completeness_goals.rationale: README: 'Use state.LastPrompt (loaded from session state) for commit messages.' Oracle replaces allPrompts[len(allPrompts)-1] with LoadSessionState + sessionState.LastPrompt in lifecycle.go:handleLifecycleTurnEnd. Maps to test gate S4.

completeness_goals.goal: Remove ExtractSummary method from the TranscriptAnalyzer interface and all agent implementations (claudecode, geminicli, opencode)
completeness_goals.rationale: README: 'Dead code cleanup: Remove ExtractSummary from the agent interface and all implementations.' User turn 1 plan lists this as dead code. Oracle removes from agent/agent.go interface, claudecode/lifecycle.go, geminicli/lifecycle.go, opencode/transcript.go. Maps to test gates S1, B3.

completeness_goals.goal: Remove the SummaryFileName constant from paths (it is no longer used since summary.txt is not written)
completeness_goals.rationale: README: 'Remove SummaryFileName constant.' Oracle removes SummaryFileName from paths/paths.go. Maps to test gate S2.

completeness_goals.goal: Rename FirstPrompt field to LastPrompt in session state struct and update all references (constants, truncation helper, status display, initialization, tests)
completeness_goals.rationale: README: 'Rename FirstPrompt -> LastPrompt.' Also update semantics so the field is refreshed on every turn (not just backfilled when empty). Oracle renames in session/state.go, strategy/manual_commit_types.go (maxFirstPromptRunes->maxLastPromptRunes), strategy/manual_commit_hooks.go, status.go. Maps to test gates S3, B1.

completeness_goals.goal: Preserve filesystem prompt.txt when carry-forward files remain after a commit (only clear it when all tracked files are committed)
completeness_goals.rationale: User turns 2-3: 'If we find that there are carry over files, we should not delete the prompt.txt from the metadata directory.' Oracle conditionally clears prompt.txt only when len(remainingFiles)==0 in manual_commit_hooks.go:postCommitProcessSession.

decomposition_notes: 2 cores + 4 secondaries + 1 polish. Default ratio gives sum_mult = 2*4 + 4*1 + 1*0.25 = 12.25; core = 4/12.25 ≈ 0.33, sec = 1/12.25 ≈ 0.08, polish = 0.25/12.25 ≈ 0.02. Rounded to sum exactly 1.00 (0.33+0.33+0.08+0.08+0.08+0.08+0.02=1.00). Goal 1 combines the removal of ExtractPrompts/WriteFile from TurnEnd with the addition of prompt append at TurnStart because they are two sides of the same behavioral change (where prompts get written). Goal 2 covers the shadow branch + filesystem fallback pattern which is the other major behavioral change. Goals 3-6 cover the explicit secondary cleanup requests from the user's plan. Goal 7 covers the user's mid-session correction about carry-forward preservation. The B4 test gate (SimulateUserPromptSubmitWithPrompt helper) is not a standalone goal because it's test infrastructure that enables verifying the core fix, not an independent behavioral requirement.
